name: jarvis
description: Jarvis - resident Windows voice assistant (monorepo root)

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && electron-builder --dir --project packages/app --config electron-builder.yml && node scripts/restore-native-abis.mjs
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && electron-builder --project packages/app --config electron-builder.yml && node scripts/restore-native-abis.mjs
